creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/dev-model/#development-model>: 

> … "production release" is the FreeBSD-STABLE branch ("-STABLE") 
> [Jørgensen, 2001]. …

How can we rephrase this, in the context of the preceding paragraphs, to make clear the (more modern) association of production with releng?
